rationale: Cheapest large energy name with the strongest analyst-revision support in the set.

name: VEDANTA LIMITED
rationale: Top blended score: strong momentum, cheap, and rising revisions — keep as largest single bet.

name: HINDALCO  INDUSTRIES  LTD
rationale: Cheap aluminium leader with positive momentum and rising revisions; cleaner balance sheet than peers.

name: ICICI BANK LTD.
rationale: Best-run private bank; add as the financials anchor on quality, not on momentum.

name: NATIONAL ALUMINIUM CO LTD
rationale: Rising revisions plus better-than-peer momentum in aluminium; cheap.

name: NMDC LTD.
rationale: Strongest analyst-revision tilt among iron-ore names, cheap, low absolute price risk.

name: CG POWER AND IND SOL LTD
rationale: Best-in-class electrification capex play; rising revisions and good momentum.

name: COAL INDIA LTD
rationale: High dividend, cheap, and rising revisions; defensive within the cyclical sleeve.

name: AXIS BANK LIMITED
rationale: Cheaper private-bank catch-up with stabilising revisions; diversifies the bank book.

name: NTPC LTD
rationale: Core utility: cheap, steady, mild positive revisions and growing renewables pipeline.

name: HITACHI ENERGY INDIA LTD
rationale: Hitachi Energy — direct grid-electrification capex beneficiary with positive momentum.

name: STATE BANK OF INDIA
rationale: Cheapest large PSU bank; value with improving balance sheet, sized for the PSU risk.

name: BSE LIMITED
rationale: Exchange with strong momentum and rising revisions; structural capital-markets growth.

name: GE VERNOVA T&D INDIA LTD
rationale: GE Vernova T&D — transmission-equipment momentum leader with rising revisions.

name: MULTI COMMODITY EXCHANGE
rationale: Commodity-exchange monopoly with momentum and rising revisions; volume-led growth.

name: CHOLAMANDALAM IN & FIN CO
rationale: Best-quality vehicle/SME NBFC with rising revisions despite soft recent momentum.

name: STEEL AUTHORITY OF INDIA
rationale: Cheap steel with positive momentum and decent revisions; geared to a domestic steel up-cycle.

name: COFORGE LIMITED
rationale: Strongest analyst-revision tilt in IT despite lagging price — a revision-led mean-reversion.

name: MEESHO LIMITED
rationale: E-commerce scale story; very cheap on the value screen but soft revisions — trim slightly.

name: SAMVRDHNA MTHRSN INTL LTD
rationale: Global auto-components compounder with positive revisions; cheap-ish.

name: KOTAK MAHINDRA BANK LTD
rationale: High-quality bank, neutral momentum; held for franchise quality and diversification.

name: BAJAJ AUTO LIMITED
rationale: Strong analyst revisions in autos; export/premium 2W recovery.

name: TATA CONSULTANCY SERV LT
rationale: Quality large-cap IT with rising revisions; cheap-ish after a weak price run.

name: POLYCAB INDIA LIMITED
rationale: Wires-and-cables leader benefiting from electrification and housing capex.

name: TITAN COMPANY LIMITED
rationale: Premier jewellery/consumer franchise; mild positive revisions, defensive quality.

name: BAJAJ FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Premier consumer-lending franchise; weak momentum, held small on quality.

name: SUN PHARMACEUTICAL IND L
rationale: Largest pharma; defensive ballast, neutral signals, lowers beta.

name: TVS MOTOR COMPANY  LTD
rationale: Premium 2W/EV franchise; neutral momentum, held small on franchise and revisions.

name: TATA STEEL LIMITED
rationale: Cheap global steel with stabilising momentum; small additional materials leg.

name: TECH MAHINDRA LIMITED
rationale: Turnaround IT with rising revisions; keep small as a margin-recovery option.

name: HIMADRI SPECIALITY CHEM L
rationale: Specialty-chemicals/carbon-black leader with rising revisions and decent momentum.

name: APOLLO HOSPITALS ENTER. L
rationale: Structural healthcare-services compounder; defensive growth, held small.

name: BHARTI AIRTEL LIMITED
rationale: Quality telecom with pricing power; weak recent momentum, keep small.

name: TRENT LTD
rationale: Best-in-class retail compounder but rich and momentum has cooled; trim, keep small.

name: SHRIRAM FINANCE LIMITED
rationale: Keep small: cheap NBFC but revisions are soft; size below Chola on weaker signal.

name: FEDERAL BANK LTD
rationale: Mid-tier bank, neutral signals; trim from prior weight, keep small for breadth.

name: RELIANCE INDUSTRIES LTD
rationale: Index heavyweight; weak momentum, held small for benchmark risk control.

name: HINDUSTAN AERONAUTICS LTD
rationale: Defence order-book compounder but momentum has cooled and revisions softened; trim.

name: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD
rationale: Strong SUV/tractor franchise but weak momentum; trim and hold small.

name: ASIAN PAINTS LIMITED
rationale: Strong analyst revisions despite weak price; small contrarian quality-defensive add.

name: HINDUSTAN UNILEVER LTD.
rationale: Defensive FMCG anchor but weak momentum and soft revisions; trim to benchmark-light.

name: INFOSYS LIMITED
rationale: Quality IT but weak momentum and only neutral revisions; trim to a benchmark-light weight.

name: ADANI POWER LTD
rationale: Momentum is strong but analyst revisions are clearly falling — cut size sharply.
